channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google makes its appeal to overturn jury verdict branding the Play Store as illegal monopoly
item.description: Google went to appeals court Monday in an attempt to convince a three-judge panel to overturn a jury’s verdict declaring its app store for Android smartphones as an illegal monopoly and block the penalties imposed by a federal judge to stop the misbehavior.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Canada's most populous province to pause retaliatory measures as US puts tariffs on hold
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The leader of Ontario, Canada’s most populous province, said Monday he will pause all retaliatory measures against the United States after news broke that the threat of tariffs has been put on hold for a month.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Dramatic drop in monarch butterfly count nears record 30-year low
item.description: The number of monarch butterflies spending the winter in the western United States dropped dramatically this year even as federal officials move to extend protections for the beloved pollinator.
item.dc:creator: Todd Richmond, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Court restores protections for endangered whale species to prevent entanglement in fishing gear
item.description: A federal appeals court is reinstating rules designed to protect a vanishing whale species from entanglement in fishing gear.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 25 enterprise tech predictions and goals for 2025, from APAC CIOs
item.description: As enterprises across Southeast Asia and Hong Kong undergo rapid digitalisation, democratisation of artificial intelligence (AI) and evolving cloud strategies are reshaping how they operate.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump's tariff threat sends crypto prices falling, including his own meme coin
item.description: Cryptocurrency prices took a hit from the prospect of a trade war between the U.S. and its major trading partners, with some well-known digital assets and President Donald Trump’s own meme coin taking big hits.
item.dc:creator: Alan Suderman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: VMware by Broadcom: Product, service and support news
item.description: News of Broadcom’s plans to acquire VMware triggered concerns among customers, partners, and industry watchers, many of whom recalled Broadcom’s track record with prior high-profile acquisitions, including network switching vendor Brocade in 2016 for almost $6 billion, software firm CA Technologies
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nvidia's new Smooth Motion technology is exclusive to RTX 5000 series GPUs, but not for long - RTX 4000 series support incoming
item.description: Nvidia will enhance RTX 4000 users' experience, with Smooth Motion making its way to the previous generation in a future update.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Bill Gates shares his thoughts on vaccine backlash, Intel's woes and Google's antitrust battle
item.description: Although Microsoft founder Bill Gates sat down for an interview with The Associated Press to discuss his new memoir, “Source Code: My Beginnings,” he also shared his views on a variety of other topics, including vaccine conspiracy views about him, his thoughts on the struggles of longtime computer c
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Aston Martin has a bright idea to make future EVs more exciting to drive, but it’s not what you think
item.description: Aston's CEO says that sending physical vibrations through its upcoming EVs could help create better emotional connections.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Samsung just quietly retired its Google Messages rival, and not everyone will be happy about it
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 series ditches Samsung's native default messaging app for Google Messages, marking the end of support for Samsung Messages.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Bad news, PC gamers: this retailer’s worst-case prediction for the Nvidia RTX 5090 GPU is a long wait until almost June for the GPU to be back in stock
item.description: Hoping to buy an Nvidia RTX 5090? You could be waiting for months, and RTX 5080 stock looks shaky too, according to one retailer.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple Watch Series 11: Everything we know so far
item.description: We're expecting another Apple Watch to arrive sometime in September 2025 – here's what we know so far.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Dell ends hybrid work policy, becomes latest tech giant to force workers back to the office full-time
item.description: Employees living within an hour of a Dell office will need to work from there five days per week beginning next month.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Java Startup Times Improved with Proposed Stable Values API - New Tech Insights
item.description: A proposed Java Enhancement Proposal (JEP) aims to improve startup times for Java applications through a stable values API, enabling faster and more efficient initialization of application state.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5
